item.title: rasbt/LLMs-from-scratch
item.description: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step

item.description: 21 Lessons, Get Started Building with Generative AI

item.description: SD.Next: All-in-one WebUI for AI generative image and video creation, captioning and processing

item.title: huggingface/transformers.js
item.description: State-of-the-art Machine Learning for the web. Run 🤗 Transformers directly in your browser, with no need for a server!

item.title: openvinotoolkit/openvino
item.description: OpenVINO™ is an open source toolkit for optimizing and deploying AI inference
